source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/90_규격 Test report/1. 시험소 제출서류/04. 회로도_패턴도_부품배치도_블록다이어그램/1. 회로도/2. Cyan(GT1717C,GT1717CP)_Gate/Cyan(GT1717C,GT1717CP)_Gate.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Circuit schematic for CYAN GATA/CYZN_GATA gate circuitry, including main signal level shifting, power rails, and GATA connector blocks.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF regulatory/test report supporting schematic documentation for CYAN GT1717C and GT1717CP.
keyPoints: Document index lists pages for DOC, MAIN&Signal, POWER, GATA_CON1-3, and GATA_CON4-6.
Level shift is specified between FPGA 1.5 V and Gata 3.3 V.
Power inputs include VGH_15V5, VGL_N8V, VCC_3V3/2A, LDO VGL_7V/1A, VGH_15V/1A, and VCC_1V5/0.3A.
GATA connectors CON1 through CON6 use 05002HR-50J05 and repeat pin functions including GUARD, VSRI, VEE, VGG, VCC, GND, CPV, OE, LR, and STV signals.
Revision history states V1.0 dated 27/05/2025 with description Rev-A Release.

evidence.claim: The source path associates the document with CYAN product models GT1717C and GT1717CP.
The revision information includes V1.0, dated 27/05/2025, with Rev-A Release description.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev V1.0 27/05/2025 Date Rev-A Release Description

evidence.claim: The document contains five sheets including DOC, MAIN&Signal, POWER, GATA_CON1-3, and GATA_CON4-6.
evidence.evidenceText: Page DOC 03 00 GATA_CON1-3 02 Description MAIN&Signal 04 GATA_CON4-6 ... POWER 05

evidence.claim: The MAIN&Signal sheet specifies level shifting between FPGA 1.5 V and Gata 3.3 V.
The schematic identifies power inputs including VGH_15V5, VGL_N8V, VCC_3V3/2A, LDO VGL_7V/1A, VGH_15V/1A, and VCC_1V5/0.3A.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Input VGH_15V5 VGL_N8V VCC_3V3/2A LDO VGL_7V/1A VGH_15V/1A VCC_1V5/0.3A

evidence.claim: The POWER sheet includes regulators TPS7A4700RGWR, TPS7A3301RGWR, and AP7331-15WG-7.
evidence.evidenceText: U3 TPS7A4700RGWR ... U4 TPS7A3301RGWR ... U5 AP7331-15WG-7

evidence.claim: GATA connectors CON1 through CON6 use part number 05002HR-50J05.
The connector pin list includes repeated signal names such as GUARD, VSRI, VEE, VGG, VCC, GND, CPV, OE, LR, and STV.
Normal output mode routes STV from FPGA through GATA_STV_R and STV_LR1 to STV_LR5 before returning through GATA_STV_L to FPGA when HI.
evidence.evidenceText: Normal output mode HI= FPGA → GATA_STV_R → STV_LR1→ STV_LR2 →STV_LR3 →STV_LR4 →STV_LR5 →GATA_STV_L → FPGA

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
Multiple dates appear in the source: revision date 27/05/2025, sheet dates Monday, July 07, 2025, and Thursday, August 21, 2025.
No regulatory standards are identified in the source text.
OCR/text extraction contains likely inconsistencies such as CYAN GATA versus CYZN_GATA and duplicated title blocks.
